commands.review_summary:
The PR wraps two Twilio SMS success-response JSON.parse paths and adds malformed-response regression tests.

PR surface: Source +10, Tests +27. Total +37 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main calls JSON.parse directly on Twilio list and Messaging Service success bodies, so an injected malformed success body reaches a raw SyntaxError path. I did not run a live Twilio reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor-provided real behavior proof and normal maintainer merge validation, not an automatable code repair.

target.title: fix(sms): guard Twilio JSON.parse against malformed API response bodies
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

`extensions/sms/src/twilio.ts` has two `JSON.parse()` sites without try/catch protection on Twilio API response bodies:

- `parseTwilioListPayload:427` — used by `listTwilioIncomingPhoneNumbers`
- `retrieveTwilioMessagingService:490` — Messaging Service lookup

Malformed JSON from the Twilio API causes unhandled SyntaxError.

Note: `parseTwilioApiError` (line 85) and `parseTwilioSuccessPayload` (line 104) already have try/catch — only these two sites needed hardening.

## Changes

- `parseTwilioListPayload`: wrap `JSON.parse(text)` in try/catch → return `[]` on failure (fail-safe for phone number listing)
- `retrieveTwilioMessagingService`: wrap `JSON.parse(response.text)` in try/catch → throw descriptive Error
- 2 new tests exercising both malformed JSON paths via `fetchImpl` injection

Label: bugfix | merge-risk: 🟢 minimal | AI-assisted

## Evidence

### Unit tests — exercise changed functions via fetchImpl injection

```
pnpm exec vitest run extensions/sms/src/twilio.test.ts

 ✓ rejects malformed JSON from successful Twilio sends
 ✓ releases guarded Twilio egress on malformed successful send responses
 ✓ rejects malformed JSON from Twilio Messaging Service lookup
 ✓ returns empty list on malformed JSON from Twilio incoming phone number list
 ... (all existing tests pass)

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
```

### Before/after

```
// parseTwilioListPayload — before
const parsed = JSON.parse(text);  // 💥 SyntaxError

// after
try { parsed = JSON.parse(text); } catch { return []; }  // fail-safe

// retrieveTwilioMessagingService — before
const parsed = JSON.parse(response.text);  // 💥 SyntaxError

// after
try { parsed = JSON.parse(response.text); } catch {
  throw new Error("... malformed JSON.");  // graceful
}
```
target.author: lsr911
